nasb.text: It came about after these things that Joshua the son of Nun, the servant of the Lord, died, being one hundred and ten years old.

esv.text: After these things Joshua the son of Nun, the servant of the Lord, died, being 110 years old.

cnv.text: 這些事以後，耶和華的僕人、嫩的兒子約書亞死了，那時他是一百一十歲。

ccb.text: 后来，耶和华的仆人、嫩的儿子约书亚去世了，享年一百一十岁。
